notes: The file's central device is the type synonym `LinfAt` plus the record `Sinf`, which together bypass a Lean 4 `Meta.SynthInstance.tryResolve` negative-cache failure on `↥(integralClosure …)` Subalgebra coercions (documented comment references commit 538ff64 and Mathlib NormalClosure pattern). No sorries, no `set_option maxHeartbeats`; the only non-default option is `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` scoped to `section SinfConstruction`. The 10 declarations marked unused within this file are all consumed by `GapSpines.lean`, `L6Witnesses.lean`, and `PoleDivisorFallback.lean`.
